driver.title: UCM Driver
driver.fullDescription: UCM Driver allows medical transport drivers to manage dialysis and clinic trips, receive dispatch updates, and navigate safely.

clinic.title: UCM Clinic
clinic.fullDescription: UCM Clinic enables healthcare clinics to schedule and monitor patient transportation in real time.

admin.title: UCM Dispatch
admin.fullDescription: UCM Dispatch provides real-time control over drivers, trips, clinics and patient transportation logistics.
